title: Module 1
content:
OVERVIEW OF MEDICAL DEVICES - Medical device definition,
Need for Medical Devices, Need for regulatory control and standards -
History of Medical Device Regulation - Classification of Medical Devices
- Medical Device Design - Product Lifecycle of Medical Device, Medical
Device development process, Medical Device Design process, Testing –
verification and Validation

title: Module 2
content:
MEDICAL DEVICE DIVISION IN INDIA:  Functions of medical
device division- Registration and Licensing- Import Procedure- Approval
of new medical devices- Constitution of medical advisory committees.
Clinical trial regulation - Concerns in clinical trials. Diversity of medical
devices.

title: Module 3
content:
AWS AND GUIDELINES FOR HANDLING MEDICAL DEVICES
IN INDIA:  Objectives of Drugs & Cosmetic Act 1940 & Rules 1945,
Functions of CDSCO, Functions of state licensing authorities
REGULATIONS AND GUIDELINES OF MEDICAL DEVICES IN
WHO AND FDA:  Organizational Structure, Purpose and Functions of
Regulatory Guidelines - Working Groups, Summary Technical Document
(STED), Global Medical Device Nomenclature (GMDN). WHO
regulations of Medical Devices, FDA regulations of Medical Devices

title: Module 4
content:
ETHICS AND STANDARDS IN CLINICAL INVESTIGATION OF
MEDICAL DEVICES: Clinical Investigation of Medical Devices-
Clinical Investigation Plan for Medical Devices - Good Clinical Practice
for Clinical Investigation of medical devices (ISO 14155:2011).
Quality: Quality System Regulations of Medical Devices - ISO 13485,
Quality Risk Management of Medical Devices - ISO 14971, Validation
and Verification of Medical devices. - Adverse Event Reporting of
Medical devices - Current trends in the use of standards in medical device
regulations
